title: 11 Natural Herbal Creams for Singers Dealing with Vocal Loss
description: Thymus serpyllum creams can help with a lost voice due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Thymus serpyllum, also known as wild thyme, contains thymol, a compound that helps to combat infections and reduce swelling in the throat. The cream's constituents, including glycerin and beeswax, soothe and protect the skin, allowing it to heal faster.
